_meta.description: Curated analysis branch catalog for the CC-inclusive d2sigma/dpT dp|| reproduction. Single source of truth for which AnaTuple branches this analysis uses and why; Step-3 cut code imports its REQUIRED_BRANCHES from the reco_selection role here.
_meta.status: PROVISIONAL (user note 2026-06-12): names/dtypes/usage are code- and stream-verified, but the prose definitions await confirmation against docs/minerva/branches.md and the vendored Tuple-Documentation CSV; unverified detail claims: minos_trk_qp units (only the sign is load-bearing), vtx[3]/mc_vtx[3]=t.
sources: exploration repo tools/cc_inclusive_selector.py (certified, 0 mismatches vs Stage B)
dtypes verified by streaming the golden pair, 2026-06-12

roles.measurement: reco-side ingredients of muon p_T and p_parallel
roles.measurement_true: truth-side ingredients of muon p_T and p_parallel (migration, efficiency axes)
roles.diagnostics: channel breakdown, not used in the extraction itself
roles.weights_later: needed by the MnvTunev1 weight stage, presence-checked now

_meta.presence_semantics: in_data refers to the data file's MasterAnaDev tree; in_mc_reco to the MC file's MasterAnaDev tree; in_truth to the MC file's Truth tree. Branches with in_data=false were verified ABSENT in the data tree (not sentinel-filled) on run 10066.

mc_current.source: GENIE convention via MINERvA-101 (GetCurrent()==2 -> NC background); verify on tuples at Step 3

conventions.momentum_units: MeV/c in tuples; analysis reports GeV/c (divide by 1000)
conventions.beam_rotation: true kinematics rotated by NUMI beam angle (constant lives in xsec/constants.py, provenance: dsigma_dpt.py NUMI_BEAM_ANGLE_RAD=-0.05887)

branches.name: vtx
branches.definition: Reconstructed event vertex; z for the tracker fiducial cut [5980,8422] mm, (x,y) for the 850 mm hexagonal apothem cut.

branches.name: muon_thetaX
branches.definition: Muon track angle projected on the x-z plane (detector coords); input to theta3d.

branches.name: muon_thetaY
branches.definition: Muon track angle projected on the y-z plane; input to theta3d.

branches.name: isMinosMatchTrack
branches.definition: 1 if the MINERvA muon track is matched to a MINOS track. Must pass BEFORE the charge-sign cut (load-bearing order: qp is unphysical for unmatched tracks).

branches.name: phys_n_dead_discr_pair_upstream_prim_track_proj
branches.definition: Dead discriminator pairs upstream of the primary track projection; <=1 required (guards against rock-muon pileup mis-reconstruction).

branches.name: MasterAnaDev_minos_trk_qp
branches.definition: MINOS track charge/momentum; < 0 selects mu- (neutrino mode). Only meaningful when isMinosMatchTrack==1.

branches.name: MasterAnaDev_leptonE
branches.definition: Reconstructed muon 4-momentum. Reco p_T = |p| * sin(theta3d)/1000, p_parallel = |p| * cos(theta3d)/1000 (Stage-B convention).

branches.name: mc_incoming
branches.definition: True incoming-neutrino PDG. Signal requires == nu_mu id (fetched from pdg API). ABSENT in data tree.

branches.name: mc_current
branches.definition: True interaction current. Signal requires ==1 (CC); background category NC is ==2, Wrong_Sign is everything else. ABSENT in data tree.

branches.name: mc_intType
branches.definition: GENIE interaction type (QE/RES/DIS/2p2h/COH...) for channel-mix diagnostics; not used in the extraction itself.

branches.name: mc_vtx
branches.definition: True event vertex; z/apothem define the truth phase space (efficiency denominator). ABSENT in data tree.

branches.name: mc_primFSLepton
branches.definition: True primary final-state lepton 4-momentum; rotated by the NUMI beam angle to get true p_T/p_parallel and theta_lep (phase space: theta<=20deg, p_z>=1500 MeV).

branches.name: mc_incomingE
branches.definition: True incoming-neutrino energy; input to the flux CV weight (Enu_GeV = mc_incomingE/1000) at the weights stage.

branches.name: truth_genie_wgt_*
branches.definition: GENIE knob reweight inputs (e.g. truth_genie_wgt_Rvn1pi, _Rvp1pi for the non-res-pi tune). Presence-checked now; consumed at the weights stage.

branches.name: mc_Q2
branches.definition: True four-momentum transfer squared; q3True = sqrt(mc_Q2 + q0True^2) (TruthFunctions.h:37-47). Input to the 2p2h and RPA weights.

branches.name: mc_targetZ
branches.definition: Z of the struck nucleus; gates 2p2h (Z>=2) and RPA (Z>=6, selects the per-nucleus ratio table).

branches.name: MasterAnaDev_minos_trk_p
branches.definition: MINOS-reconstructed muon momentum; input (clamped to [1,4] GeV) of the MINOS-efficiency correction curves.

branches.name: numi_pot
branches.definition: Per-spill delivered POT; batch POT = numi_pot/k with k from the batch structure (MinervaUniverse.cxx:441-484). MINOS-efficiency input.

branches.name: batch_structure
branches.definition: Beam batch structure of the spill (0/1/2/3/-1); selects the divisor k in the batch-POT calculation.

branches.name: reco_vertex_batch
branches.definition: Batch of the reconstructed vertex within the spill; refines k for batch structures 1 and 2.

branches.name: ev_run
branches.definition: Run number of the event; must match the filename run for data.

branches.name: ev_subrun
branches.definition: Subrun number of the event.

branches.name: ev_gate
branches.definition: Beam gate (spill) number within the subrun.

branches.name: ev_gps_time_sec
branches.definition: Wall-clock GPS timestamp of the gate (seconds). Data-taking time span per file; physical for data only (MC carries simulated placeholders).

branches.name: ev_gps_time_usec
branches.definition: Sub-second part of the gate GPS timestamp.

branches.name: POT_Used
branches.definition: Quality-good POT for this file; dataset POT = sum over all Meta entries of all files. THE exposure number used in the analysis.

branches.name: POT_Total
branches.definition: Total delivered POT for this file (incl. quality-rejected); recorded for comparison, not used in normalization.
